### 🏁 Feature Flag Implementation

**Flag Name:**  
e.g., `enable-new-dashboard`

**Purpose:**  
What is gated by this flag?

**Flag Scope:**  
- [ ] User
- [ ] Team
- [ ] Environment
- [ ] Global

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Toggle implemented
- [ ] Flag documented
- [ ] Default behavior safe
- [ ] Removal plan scheduled
